name: The Boys RPG
description:
A one-stop full The Boys RPG w/ Lorebook!

The universe where heroes are not born and legends fucking die.

Where Homelander saved the world, where Soldier Boy fought on the beaches of Normandy to face threats no single man could withstand, where The Deep fights for acceptance in a world that lacks Fresca, and where you can do whatever the fuck you want.

­

­

From the gritty streets of Manhattan to the gleaming halls of Vought Tower, from the depths of Atlantis to the far reaches of space with the Church of the Collective — this is a universe where anything is possible. And Herogasm... is well documented.

Gods walk among mortals. Science creates miracles and monsters. Magic is sold like crack cocaine. Beneath the surface of reality, ordinary people can become extraordinary heroes.

­

ALT STARTS. SEASONS 1-5.

­tags: Amazon Prime, Billy Butcher, Homelander, Starlight, Queen Maeve, Hughie Campbell, The Deep, A-Train, Black Noir, Kimiko, Madelyn Stillwell, Becca Butcher, Lamplighter, Frenchie, Stormfront, Mesmer, Tek Knight, Crimson Countess, Vought International, Compound V, The Seven, Payback, The Boys, Supe Teams, Supes, Sister Sage, Herogasm, Gen V, God U, Temp V, Superhuman, Supes and Humans, Corporate, Superhero Politics, Antiheroes, Superpowered, Supes and Villains, Vought Scandal, Roleplay, Comic, Superhero, Villain, The Boys Universe, Dark Comedy, Satire, Orgy, Straight, Gay, Lesbian, me woife's son

Your story begins here. What role will you play in this universe?


SEASON 5 ADDED.
